---
title: "Hobbies"
---

::: {.page-header}
# Hobbies and Interests

A more personal page about the things I enjoy outside normal coursework.
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.card}
### Tennis
Tennis is my main sport. I like it because small technical changes can make a big difference: timing, footwork, spacing, and decision-making all matter.
:::

::: {.card}
### Markets and data
I enjoy following markets because they combine economics, psychology, uncertainty, and data. It is a useful area for practising careful analysis.
:::

::: {.card}
### Building small tools
I like creating small systems that make life easier, whether that is a dashboard, automation script, or clean report template.
:::
:::

## Things I want to learn next {.section-title}

::: {.tag-list}
<span class="tag">Better dashboards</span>
<span class="tag">Cleaner writing</span>
<span class="tag">R and Quarto</span>
<span class="tag">Data storytelling</span>
<span class="tag">Automation</span>
<span class="tag">Tennis technique</span>
:::

## Why this matters {.section-title}

The common theme is improvement. Whether it is sport, coding, or communication, I enjoy breaking a problem down, testing what works, and making the next version better.
